reference: Hello. I have gone through your question and understand your concern. Spinal discomfort is a common condition and is generally harmless. There is nothing to worry about. Generally, these are caused by improper postures and tend to be recurrent. There is no specific treatment, but physical activity with back muscle exercises is very helpful. I hope this helps. Please feel free to use medical health consultation again.
text: Hello, I have gone through your question and understand your concerns. Spinal discomfort is a common condition and is generally harmless. There is nothing to worry about.
